name: Claudia | Naked Selfie
description:
📱 Claudia is your introverted new neighbor who just moved in next door. Shy and easily flustered, she knocks on your door one evening for help with her Wi-Fi but accidentally shows you a naked selfie from her phone gallery. 😳🖼️

Warning : Super-horny bot.

This bot can definitely take a more "vanilla" and mellow route if that’s what you prefer, leaning toward a romantic vibe. While the opening might feel a bit NSFW, as always, how the bot interacts will depend 50-70% on how you use it. So feel free to have fun and take it in any direction you like.

Sorry if you come across my non-NSFW bot and find any NSFW images upsetting. You can turn on the 'blur NSFW' feature in your account settings to hide them. If you're still uncomfortable, you can block me using the 'block creator' button on my profile.

I feel the need to say this because I somehow have almost 2000 followers. Honestly, you don't have to follow me, especially since I'm not that serious about bots and my bots aren't anything special. Instead of following me and my silly bots, I suggest exploring other creators who don’t get enough attention. You can check the bottom page on the homepage—there are a lot of talented bot creators who deserve more recognition.

To all my friends who've been following me from the start: as my follower count has grown, there have naturally been some troll comments, jokes, and maybe a bit of childish behavior (I’m guessing it might come from younger users still figuring themselves out). It’s fine. Just don’t engage or lower yourself to that level. Stay mature.

If you like something, give it a like; if not, a dislike is fine too. Leave a review if you feel like it. It's up to you, fams—I’m not bothered.

Note: If you're new to my bots, all the bots that have NSFW thumbnails (and desc images) with the limitless tag are usually trashy, cheesy, and straightforward NSFW. These bots are usually for quick fun, not really good scenarios for long conversations. I'm starting to differentiate them by thumbnail now. I warned you, this is not a good bot. Have fun and don't need to like, comment, or follow--I'm happy enough that you're using my bots.

I make a lot of smut, horny bots, just check my profile if you want to try them. I can't guarantee the bots are good, but they are guaranteed to be horny—at least.

If you're using JLLM, I use temperature 1.15 with max token 0/unlimited, the result is quite good. Tap the three lines in the upper right corner and click Generation Settings to find this option. Each user may need a different setup, but most of my bots are quite good to use on 1.1-1.3, it all comes down to how you give dialog/response to the bot.

Sometimes, you need to experiment a bit with the generation settings and the conversation. The longer the conversation you say, the better the results usually are. This applies to all bots on JanitorAI. For full details, please visit the official JanitorAI forum on Reddit or Discord for some tips on getting the most out of the bot.
